rows.label: tev021601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev021601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fine about the attack on the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev021601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Fine about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021601_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Fine about the war with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Fine about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Fine about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Fine about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0001
rows.name:
The attack on the Whale by the
xenoform pursuit force was like
living through a nightmare.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0002
rows.name:
We'd slay them and slay them, but
the unidentified xenos would just
keep pouring out of deep space.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'd watch as my friends' Dolls were destroyed
in silence, and as the armor on the White
Whale's hull shattered without a sound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0004
rows.name:
We fought as hard as we could, but
they ultimately broke through our
defensive line and infiltrated the ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0005
rows.name:
So many people were murdered by those
monsters, and they never even knew why.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0006
rows.name:
I intend to continue fighting for humanity,
but I hope that I never have to be a
part of a battle like that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Have you ever fought the Overed they call
Eckart the Indestructible who lurks on the
high ground of the Grieving Plains?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0009
rows.name:
I guess we Avalanche can boast that
we were able to face down a creature
like that and live to tell the tale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0010
rows.name:
But in truth, we were no match for the
beast. We had four Dolls concentrating
fire on it, and the thing barely flinched.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0011
rows.name:
After it destroyed Grette's Doll, our
leader, Adelbert, ordered a full retreat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Of all the planets to land on, why'd it have to be this
one? ...Still, I guess I should be grateful that at least
my friend Grette wasn't wounded in the incident.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0021
rows.name:
I will never forgive the monsters
that killed Grette and the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0022
rows.name:
I know it's probably shameless
to ask you this, seeing as how
I'm planning to leave BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0023
rows.name:
But please, I beg of you—kill every
last one of those bastards for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Hunt them down and wipe every last member
of the Growth off the face of Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0014
rows.name:
I've received treatment from the
counselor and the Blue Blood
technician that Dirk found for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thanks to that, I've finally
been able to go outside again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0016
rows.name:
But I still intend to quit BLADE.
I never want to see anything like
what happened ever again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Still, I've been thinking of looking for some
sort of support job I can perform here in the
city. It's the least I can do, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0018
rows.name:
I can't just keep relying
on Dirk for everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0030
rows.name:
I heard that they found the Central
Life, and that it's all thanks to
the data your team reclaimed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0031
rows.name: Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0032
rows.name:
Now if everything goes well, they might be
able to bring Adelbert and Grette back to
life, along with everyone else who died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0033
rows.name:
For the sake of all our fallen
friends, I wish you the best of
luck on the final recovery mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0040
rows.name:
So my fleshly body is asleep in the
Central Life, alongside yours, and
Adelbert's, and Grette's, and everyone else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0041
rows.name:
And if we've secured that, it means
that everyone will be able to return
to the way they were, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0042
rows.name:
Grette will be back bossing everyone
around, and Adelbert will be back rushing
about trying to make Grette happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0043
rows.name:
And Dirk and I will be able to watch them
and roll our eyes in amusement. ...Can
we really return to those days again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021601_MSG0044
rows.name:
I hope they complete their investigation soon.
Then all of us who have lost so much can finally
see our family and friends return home.[ST:wait ]
